steps.name: When  I turn on test mode in "Palace Bookshelf" library

And  I search for "The Oregon Trail" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'

steps.name: And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Description is not empty in book details screen
And  Button More in Description is available on book details screen
